programme.title: 1st Wave
programme.desc: The First Wave of alternative music, centered in the 1980s but including legendary artists and cult classics from the '70s through the early '90s.

programme.title: 20/20 True Crime
programme.desc: A nonstop destination for gripping true crime storytelling from ABC News and 20/20. Hear award-winning podcasts, full episodes of 20/20, installments of 20/20: The After Show, and cases from the 20/20 True Crime Vault. From headline-making investigations to unforgettable mysteries, dive into the stories, twists, and reporting that brings the truth to light. True Crime, all the time.

programme.title: 40s Junction
programme.desc: This joint is jumpin'! The swing era lives on as you journey on the Savoy Express to the 40s Junction! A station humming with big bands, vocal stars, and classic melodies from the 1940s. You'll be in 'In The Mood,' to jitterbug and lindy hop! Crooners serenade and harmony groups shine in jazzy orchestras that swing and sway. So, hey hep cats! 'Let's Dance!'

programme.title: 50s Gold
programme.desc: Take a trip to the era of the new teenage craze of rock 'n' roll and the pre-rock songs Mom & Dad preferred. The sound of happy days and drive-in nights with pop radio the way it used to be - from crooners to street corner harmony.

programme.title: 60s Gold
programme.desc: It started with the Twist and ended with Woodstock, all 60s hits from Motown and surf music to the British Invasion and folk rock. Hear The Beach Boys, Supremes, Rolling Stones, Aretha Franklin, Four Seasons, The Beatles and more!

programme.title: 70s on 7
programme.desc: Slip on your bell bottoms and light a lava lamp! It's the super 70s with DJs who boogie down and spin 45 rpm records. Polyester outfits, pet rocks, CB radios and disco from a galaxy far, far away! Far out, man!

programme.title: 80s on 8
programme.desc: 80s pop hits from the MTV era! The decade when greed was good, hair was high and everyone learned what a music video was. Prince, Wham!, Madonna, Michael Jackson, Cyndi Lauper and Journey! They're all here and so are the original MTV VJs.

programme.title: 80s on 8 Top 500
programme.desc: Counting down the most rad, awesome hits from the 1980s! Righteous songs from Michael Jackson, Journey, Madonna, Prince, Huey Lewis & The News, Hall & Oates, Cyndi Lauper, Kool & The Gang, The Go-Go's, Whitney Houston, Van Halen, Howard Jones, Phil Collins, Billy Joel and more!

programme.title: 90s on 9
programme.desc: If it was 'all that' in the 90s, it's on 90s on 9. Get jiggy with the hottest 90s music from boy bands to pop queens, grunge rock, hip-hop and R&B with artists like Mariah Carey, Backstreet Boys, TLC, Green Day, Alanis Morissette, Boyz II Men, Aerosmith, Britney Spears and more. Hosted by legendary personalities Downtown Julie Brown & Spyder Harrison, singer/songwriter Lisa Loeb and Sugar Ray's Mark McGrath.

programme.title: 90s on 9 Top 500
programme.desc: Counting down the top 500 most wicked-awesome 90s hits! From grunge to diva, from boy bands to girl groups, from dance pioneers to hip-hop legends - including hits from Boyz II Men, No Doubt, Backstreet Boys, Nirvana and more.

programme.title: A State of Armin
programme.desc: Armin van Buuren proudly presents 'A State of Armin', an entire channel devoted to the sounds of Trance, Progressive, and Downtempo Dance Music he has cultivated over his twenty-year career. Hear his longstanding, globally successful radio show, A State of Trance, as well as Armin's favorite picks and a library of Trance, Progressive, and Downtempo hits, remixes, and classics from both Armin himself and his collaborators.

programme.title: ABC News Live
programme.desc: ABC News Live is your daily source for breaking news across the U.S. and around the globe. Stay up to date on the latest headlines in politics, weather, health, business and more with our 24/7 live streaming coverage.

Each week catch the most popular alt tracks on the Alt18 Countdown, powered by Alt Nation listener votes, catch exclusive session performances and interviews from some of your favorite (and next favorite) artists, plus go next level with your alt music discovery on Alt Nation's weekly new music show, Advanced Placement!

programme.title: Alt2K
programme.desc: Relive the emotion, energy, and exploration of 2000s and 2010s alternative. Hear the pop-punk, rock, indie, and emo that rewrote the rules and defined a generation from artists like Blink-182, The Killers, Paramore, The Strokes, Linkin Park, and more.

programme.title: Attitude Franco
programme.desc: All the rock attitude, whether commercial or alternative. From sacred icons like Offenbach and Corbeau to newcomers Corridor and Gazoline, if it's French rock, you'll hear it here!

programme.title: BB King's Bluesville
programme.desc: B.B. King's channel for blues music from the past to the present: B.B. King, Stevie Ray Vaughan, Muddy Waters, Buddy Guy, Eric Clapton, Etta James, Robert Cray, Keb' Mo', Taj Mahal, John Lee Hooker and others.

programme.title: BBC World Service
programme.desc: News as it breaks from around the world.

programme.title: BPM
programme.desc: The beat drops here on BPM. Hear the top dance and electronic hits 24/7. We'll keep you up to date with what's happening in clubs and festivals all over the world. Hear anything from house music, to future bass and everything in between.

programme.title: BYUradio
programme.desc: BYUradio provides fresh, fun and informative radio programming for audiences of all ages. Whether you're looking for engaging conversations (The Lisa Show), deep dives on current events (Top of Mind with Julie Rose), explorations on the world around you (Constant Wonder), or the best in storytelling (The Apple Seed), BYUradio has something for every member of the family.

programme.title: Bakersfield Beat
programme.desc: Bakersfield inspired a lifestyle, an attitude and a musical movement... it also inspired Dwight Yoakam to put that all together and make this channel. 'The Bakersfield Beat' is a celebration of the artistry from Buck Owens and Merle Haggard, to Dwight's music, California Country, California Country-rock, Cow-punk and Now-punk... ALL influenced by the 'Bakersfield Sound'.

programme.title: Bill Gaither's enLighten
programme.desc: Uplifting, harmony-driven Gospel music with stories, inspiration and hope from iconic singer/songwriter Bill Gaither. Plus music from The GVB, Booth Brothers, Jeff & Sheri Easter, Karen Peck & New River, Greater Vision & more.

programme.title: Billboard Top 500
programme.desc: It's a countdown of the Top 500 Summer Hits according to Billboard including songs by Mariah Carey, The Police, Lil Nas X, Bee Gees, Katy Perry and The Beatles. Eight decades of Summertime songs that bring back memories of long days and warm nights!!!

programme.title: Bloomberg Radio
programme.desc: Bloomberg Radio is the world's only global 24-hour business radio station. Powered by more than 2700 journalists and analysts in more than 120 countries, Bloomberg Radio's resources are unparalleled. Because the financial markets never sleep, Bloomberg follows them around the globe.

programme.title: Bluegrass Junction
programme.desc: Experience the cutting-edge sounds of bluegrass music while never straying too far from its roots and traditions... including weekly shows from Chris Jones, Ned Luberecki, Joey Black and the legendary Del McCoury!

programme.title: Bob Marley's Tuff Gong
programme.desc: The king of reggae lives - on his own channel! Now, all of Bob Marley's music is in one place - including rare gems, his family's prolific recordings, and music from Tuff Gong, the family label he founded. Make any day better hangin' with the Marleys. You're invited to listen to Bob Marley's Tuff Gong Radio, a comfortable place for great music and good vibes.

programme.title: Bon Jovi Radio
programme.desc: Bon Jovi Radio celebrates the career of beloved Rock & Roll Hall of Fame inductees Bon Jovi. You'll hear insight from Jon Bon Jovi and the band, studio tracks from every album, and exclusive weekly concerts sourced directly from the band's rich archive. Plus catch Guest DJ programs from celebrities and fans alike. Explore over three decades of rock anthems and other songs hand-chosen by Jon Bon Jovi.

programme.title: Chris Stapleton Radio
programme.desc: Get closer to one of the most original and authentic artists today - singer, songwriter, and musician, Chris Stapleton. Listen as he shares music spanning his entire career, and the stories behind those songs. Chris Stapleton Radio is the home to the kings and queens of country, rock, soul, and more - handpicked by Chris and his band, The Honchos.

programme.title: Chucho's Cuba & Beyond
programme.desc: Legendary Cuban pianist, bandleader and composer, Chucho Valdés invites you on a timeless musical journey to explore the cultural richness of Cuban music, past and present. programme.title: Classic Rock Top 1000

programme.title: Comedy Classics
programme.desc: Classic stand-up from icons of the past, who paved the way for the greats we love today. Timeless comedy that shaped the landscape and defined generations. Featuring legends like Bob Newhart, Joan Rivers, Jackie Gleason and Redd Foxx, as well as exclusive classic archives.

programme.title: Comedy Greats
programme.desc: Comedy Greats plays the best material from the biggest names - from classic comedians of the past to the icons of today. You'll hear comedy legends like Eddie Murphy, Joan Rivers, Kevin Hart, Dave Attell, Sarah Silverman, Jim Gaffigan and more! (explicit)

programme.title: Conan O'Brien Radio

Fans can 'Be The Boss,' hear insights from E Street Band members, and enjoy special Guest DJ sessions. It's the home of all things Bruce!

programme.title: ESPN Podcasts

Plus, with 30 for 30 Podcasts, experience the award-winning storytelling that takes you beyond the headlines and into the moments that changed sports forever.

programme.title: Freakonomics Radio
programme.desc: Explore the hidden side of everything with storytelling both rigorous and entertaining. On Freakonomics Radio, Stephen Dubner explores things you always thought you knew (but didn't) and things you never thought you wanted to know (but do) - from the upside of quitting to the downside of disgust and the true stories of rent control, minimum wage, and the gender pay gap. Also: No Stupid Questions co-hosted by Angela Duckworth, Freakonomics, M.D. with Bapu Jena, and Steve Levitt's People I (Mostly) Admire.

programme.title: Grown Folk JAMZ
programme.desc: The R&B Radio Listener is multi-dimensional and Grown Folk JAMZ® features every format this listener enjoys, professionally Imaged & Positioned into one hour, every hour, thus evoking emotion from our listeners. Grown Folk JAMZ® artists are from Today and Back In The Day. Today's music listeners have multiple formats in their listening devices. With Grown Folk JAMZ®, we have ALL those R&B related formats, ALL on one station, ALL in one hour, EVERY hour. Grown Folk JAMZ® - 'We Change The Channel For Ya!'

programme.title: HBCU
programme.desc: HBCU is a collective blend of programming from Historically Black Colleges and Universities and offers a unique look into the black college experience. It bridges the gap between alumni, current and prospective students through information and entertainment. HBCU is a resource for students and faculty of each institution to work together to educate and empower. The management and delivery of programming is provided by Howard University's Radio Network, located on the university campus.

programme.title: HUR Voices
programme.desc: HUR Voices is real talk with real music for and from the people. HUR Voices is talk with a purpose that examines and explores issues that affect people of color, and music that combines new and classic soul with R&B for listener enjoyment. HUR Voices programming embodies the mission of Howard University which is to provide 'America and the Global Community' with excellence, leadership, truth and service. Managed by WHUR 96.3 FM, Howard University.

programme.title: Hair Nation

programme.title: MS NOW
programme.desc: MS NOW is a premier destination for breaking news and best-in-class opinion journalism, reaching diverse audiences across cable, online, social, and audio. MS NOW is an essential part of millions of Americans' daily lives, commanding one of the most engaged audiences across all of television with the average viewer watching for more than eight hours each week.

programme.title: Mad Dog Sports Radio
programme.desc: Christopher 'Mad Dog' Russo, Adam Schein, Damon Amendolara, Mike Babchik & more talk about the world of sports.

programme.title: Marky Ramone's Punk Rock
programme.desc: Marky Ramone's Punk Rock Blitzkrieg is Classic Punk 24/7 hosted by long-time Ramones drummer Marky Ramone! You'll hear Sex Pistols, Black Flag, Social Distortion, The Clash and of course, The Ramones! All this plus- Songs from Marky's personal music collection, rare recordings, live performances & more! Whether it is Ska-influenced, surf guitar-oriented, Cowpunk, Proto-Punk, Hardcore, or Pop Punk, if it's Classic Punk it's on Marky Ramone’s Punk Rock Blitzkrieg!

programme.title: Maximum Metallica
programme.desc: Ride the lightning 24/7 through Metallica's heaviest hits, rare tracks, epic live concerts, unfiltered stories, and fan-fueled fire! The Metallica family unites here, louder, faster, and heavier than ever. The most Metallica anywhere! (explicit)

programme.title: Outsiders Radio
programme.desc: Eric Church brings you Outsiders Radio, a journey through his musical experiences featuring collaborations and recordings with friends, along with behind the scenes stories from his nearly two-plus-decade career. Handpicked by The Chief himself, stop in and explore live performances plus the music he loves, from rock to country & beyond.

programme.title: Ozzy's Boneyard
programme.desc: Ozzy's Boneyard is the epicenter for hard and heavy classic rock, where the legends live loud and unfiltered. From Black Sabbath, Judas Priest, and Guns N' Roses to AC/DC, Motörhead, and Metallica, these are the riffs that shaped generations. Forever under the spell of Ozzy Osbourne, the Prince of Darkness, this is the sound of power, rebellion, and timeless volume.

programme.title: POTUS Politics
programme.desc: POTUS is Politics of the United States. Politics from all points of view with Michael Smerconish, Dan Abrams, Julie Mason, Steve Scully, Stephen A. Smith and more. Spirited interviews with representatives from both sides of the aisle. Legal analysis of breaking stories, panel discussions, and daily recaps of everything happening in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Pop Top 500
programme.desc: Counting down the biggest Pop Hits from 2000 to today! Nonstop top pop from P!nk, Bruno Mars, Taylor Swift, Justin Bieber, Beyoncé, Harry Styles, Lady Gaga, Eminem, Adele, One Direction, Rihanna, Ed Sheeran, The Weeknd, Dua Lipa, Maroon 5, Olivia Rodrigo, Justin Timberlake, Miley Cyrus and more!

programme.title: Pop2K
programme.desc: It's the hits from the 2000s that hit you right in the memories. Hear Justin Timberlake, Maroon 5, Nelly, Nickelback and all the songs you have a story about.

programme.title: PopRocks
programme.desc: The greatest pop/rock anthems from the 90s and 2000s are on PopRocks! You'll hear favorites from Green Day, No Doubt, Maroon 5, Alanis Morissette & more - plus new music on Fresh Popped Fridays. Hosted by Karen Carson, Kat Corbett, and Julia Cunningham.

programme.title: Poplandia
programme.desc: Poplandia is the soundtrack for pop culture junkies. Hear the hottest hits and exclusive interviews from your favorite artists. Movies, music, celebrity gossip, current events and more, Poplandia has you covered.

programme.title: Portland Trail Blazers
programme.desc: Live hometown play-by-play coverage of the Portland Trail Blazers

programme.title: Prime Country
programme.desc: This is where country music from the '80s and '90s lives. Garth Brooks, Reba McEntire, George Strait, Shania Twain, Alan Jackson, and Randy Travis all play here.

programme.title: Pro Wrestling Nation24/7
programme.desc: The only channel dedicated to the world of pro wrestling! Live daily shows covering everything that's going on in WWE, TNA, AEW, the 'Indies' & more. Hear from all the top superstars like Cody Rhodes, CM Punk, 'MJF', on a daily basis. Plus, daily recaps on the nightly action from everything wrestling company around the world. It's your one stop shop for all things pro wrestling.

programme.title: Pure Comedy
programme.desc: It's comedy for everybody on Pure Comedy! Check out profanity-free material from today's top comics like Jim Gaffigan and Nate Bargatze, as well as hilarious material from emerging and legendary comedians.

programme.title: RTB - Mixdown
programme.desc: Nonstop, exclusive mixes from some of hip-hop's best DJs including DJ Premier, DJ Z-Trip, Kid Capri, Magic Mike, Da Beatminerz, Cut Chemist, DJ Maseo (De La Soul) and many more! (explicit)

programme.title: RURAL Radio
programme.desc: A national radio network for rural America and Canada, featuring agriculture news and the rural lifestyle.

programme.title: Racines Musicales
programme.desc: Be it Marcel Martel or Marie King, Lisa Leblanc or Elisapie, Les Soeurs Boulay or Kain, French Canada's rich history of homegrown music is to be found on Racines Musicales. Songs that come from the heart, by French and Indigenous artists. If it's Country, Folk, Cajun or Traditional music, you'll hear it here!

programme.title: Radio Andy
programme.desc: This is Andy Cohen's universe, spanning pop culture, music, news, and so much more. Hear unbelievable moments play out live on air, plus news-making interviews, and unfiltered points of view. We can promise you that Radio Andy is always entertaining, and always unpredictable. (explicit)

programme.title: Radio Classics
programme.desc: Radio Classics is the home for the quality programs from The Golden Age Of Radio. Before television, before audio books, before podcasts, great storytelling dominated the realm of radio. It's where imagination ruled. Superman, Dragnet, Gunsmoke, plus comedies from Jack Benny, Bob Hope, Lucille Ball, George Burns & Gracie Allen all originated on radio. Those ageless shows (and so much more) can be found on Radio Classics. Timeless stories and laughs from the past for today's SiriusXM listeners.

programme.title: Radio Margaritaville
programme.desc: Escape to Margaritaville. Parrotheads, your ship has come in. From multi-platinum singer, songwriter and author Jimmy Buffett comes a radio paradise of great music, live broadcasts of Buffett's concerts and other unique programs.

programme.title: Radio Monaco
programme.desc: Take a dance journey to Monte Carlo and hear music, celebrity news and hosts where the European party never ends. From F1 all-nighters to late night house music vibes, join the 24/7 party on the SiriusXM app and on the satellite.

programme.title: Ramsey Network
programme.desc: Let our experts guide you in every area of life from finances to relationships to career.

programme.title: Real Jazz
programme.desc: Classic jazz, the original American art form. Hear the masters who pioneered the music and the new artists who continue the tradition into the 21st century.

programme.title: Red Hot Chili Peppers
programme.desc: A Whole Lotta Red Hot is your new SiriusXM channel. Dive deep into the vast, funky musical world of the Red Hot Chili Peppers on their own channel. Hear the band host shows, take you track-by-track through their new album Unlimited Love, live performances from their vault, side projects plus all of their favorite artists

programme.title: Red White & Booze
programme.desc: The music of Country-themed bars and honky tonks across America, featuring a mix of country and rock songs from artists like Toby Keith, Kenny Chesney, Zac Brown Band, Jason Aldean, Kid Rock, Lynyrd Skynyrd and more.

programme.title: Road Dog Trucking
programme.desc: Get in gear with the 24-hour channel devoted to the trucking industry. With news, information and entertainment, the channel keeps you up to date on the industry that keeps us moving.

programme.title: Road Trip 2K
programme.desc: Aux cord anthems

programme.title: Road Trip Radio
programme.desc: Roll your windows down and turn the music up! A hand-selected mix of driving jams and singalongs as unpredictable as your journey. Hear all the music from the last 60 years sure to please everyone in the car!

programme.title: Rock The Bells Radio
programme.desc: LL COOL J's Rock The Bells Radio is a channel dedicated exclusively to hip-hop fans who want that classic and timeless hip-hop sound! Launched in 2018 by LL COOL J, Rock The Bells Radio focuses on music, artist hosted shows, exclusive DJ mixes, interviews and more. (explicit)

programme.title: RockBar
programme.desc: Discover six decades of hard rock hits poured into a pint glass. Immerse yourself in the ultimate dive bar jukebox experience.

programme.desc: 90s and 2000s hard rock from Metallica, KoRn, Godsmack, Disturbed, Linkin Park and more! (explicit)

programme.title: SiriusXM Urban View
programme.desc: Urban View features dynamic discourse from prominent Black voices on topics ranging from civil rights, politics, pop culture, faith, tech, financial wellness, and more. Join Karen Hunter, Clay Cane, Lurie Daniel Favors, Rev. Al Sharpton, Lou Hutt, Wilmer Leon, Reecie Colbert, Shermichael Singleton and many more voices as they bring you powerful and engaging conversation.

programme.title: SiriusXMU
programme.desc: Groundbreaking music and emerging artists. A commercial-free mix of new music from up-and-coming bands and producers, together with the indie classics that inspired them.

programme.title: SiriusXO
programme.desc: Love songs 90s - now. The soundtrack to your modern love story. Find your feels with beats straight from the hearts of artists like Bruno Mars, Taylor Swift, John Mayer, Mariah Carey, Michael Bublé and more!

programme.title: Siriusly Sinatra
programme.desc: The Chairman of the Board is at home everyday on Siriusly Sinatra, along with Dean Martin, Tony Bennett and more of the great singers interpreting the Great American Songbook. Siriusly Sinatra is the 24-hour home for all things Frank and the standards he made famous!

programme.title: SmartLess Radio
programme.desc: SmartLess Radio is the destination for 24/7 SmartLess! 'SmartLess' with Jason Bateman, Sean Hayes & Will Arnett is a podcast that connects and unites people from all walks of life to learn about shared experiences through thoughtful dialogue and organic hilarity. In each episode of SmartLess, one of the hosts reveals his mystery guest to the other two. What ensues is a genuinely improvised and authentic conversation filled with laughter and newfound knowledge to feed the SmartLess mind. (explicit)

programme.title: Smokey's Soul Town
programme.desc: Classic Soul, R&B & Motown from the '60s and '70s live in Smokey's Soul Town! Throughout the day, Smokey shares stories from his career and picks some of his favorites from Hitsville and beyond. Plus hosted DJ shows from The Motown Museum in Detroit. Stevie, Aretha, Otis, Marvin, Jackie, Chaka, The Temptations, The Miracles, The Supremes, The Four Tops and all the Soul you can handle... 24/7 on Smokey's Soul Town!!

programme.title: Soccer en Español
programme.desc: SiriusXM offers live Spanish language broadcasts of select soccer games.

programme.title: SoulCycle Radio
programme.desc: There's a reason we ride to the rhythm as a pack. At SoulCycle, music is what connects us, moves us, and inspires us. So we designed this channel to deliver the same joy, motivation, and heart-pumping beat you expect from us in class-and then some. Whether you're in the car, walking to work, or dancing in your bedroom, turn it up for a transformative mind-body-soul experience.

programme.title: SoundCloud Radio
programme.desc: From the biggest names in hip-hop to tomorrow's breakout stars, SoundCloud is where artists get their start and new music lands first. And now when you're not on SoundCloud, you don't have to press pause on your bars, beats or discovery. Just tune in to SiriusXM to hear all the SoundCloud hip-hop hits that paved the way and new tracks driving culture today. (explicit)

programme.title: Stars
programme.desc: Hear SiriusXM's biggest stars in intimate and revealing conversations about life and culture, share lifechanging advice, and real talk with friends. Culture and celebrity collide to bring you inside the life and style of Hollywood. (explicit)

programme.title: Steve Aoki's Remix Radio
programme.desc: Dance Music icon, Entrepreneur, fashion mogul, & Label Head of Dim Mak Records, Steve Aoki has launched his own channel on SiriusXM. Steve has decided to curate a SiriusXM channel dedicated to remixes. Steve Aoki's Remix Radio will feature dance remixes of the top pop & dance hits, Steve Aoki original tracks PLUS you'll hear all of Steve's favorite songs handpicked by him

programme.title: Stevie's Coolest Songs
programme.desc: From the first by Joey Ramone, to the latest by the Cocktail Slippers, hear every Coolest Song in the World from Little Steven's Underground Garage! From the bands that broke through like Green Day & the White Stripes, to the classic artists making records today like Paul McCartney and Jeff Beck, to the Coolest Songs made five minutes ago in the garage!

programme.title: Studio 54 Radio
programme.desc: Disco, Classic, and Euro Dance music 24/7, plus legendary DJs like Jellybean Benitez, Robbie Leslie, Tony Smith, and The Marc & Myra Show hosted by original Studio 54 employees Marc Benecke and Myra Scheer.

programme.title: Sway's Universe
programme.desc: A wide array of lifestyle radio created by Sway Calloway and friends. Serving you great music, politics, Hollywood and motivating energy. Hello citizens! Welcome to Sway's Universe. (explicit)

programme.title: The 10s Spot
programme.desc: Perfect 10s all day, every day! Hits from the 2010s decade including Taylor Swift to Drake, Fall Out Boy, Lady Gaga, Justin Timberlake, Adele, Coldplay, Rihanna and more! A definitive community bonded by emoji's, social media and 10s pop hits! We're not stuck in the 10s, we like it here!

programme.title: The 2Pac Channel
programme.desc: Rock The Bells Radio presents The 2Pac Channel, celebrating the music, message, and lasting influence of Tupac Shakur. Hear iconic hits, deep album cuts, live recordings, rare collaborations, and exclusive stories reflecting on Pac's life and impact on hip-hop culture. (explicit)

programme.title: The Beach Boys Channel
programme.desc: Playing sun-drenched songs from every phase of the group's decades-spanning career! It's all on Good Vibrations: The Beach Boys Channel! From their early songs about sand, surf, girls and cars into the psychedelic period filled with rich experimentation, The Beach Boys have grown up with American pop music and have brought California's coastline to the world. Their biggest hits plus hard-to-find rarities combine for a trip to the beach, without leaving home!

programme.title: The Beatles Channel
programme.desc: The Beatles were the big bang of pop! They created the musical world we live in today. Now, for the first time, the most popular band in history presents their own channel. All things Beatles, 24/8. All of their hits, album tracks, live recordings, rarities & solo songs, along with the records that influenced them & music inspired by them. Plus interviews & exclusive hosted shows. It's the soundtrack for generations of music fans....provided by John, Paul, George, and Ringo.

programme.title: The Billy Graham Channel
programme.desc: The Billy Graham Channel gives SiriusXM listeners access to the preacher's timeless messages from seven decades of ministry as well as reflections from friends and family.

programme.title: The Blend
programme.desc: Blending nice & easy pop where you can sing along with Rod Stewart, Celine Dion, Lionel Richie, Neil Diamond, Whitney Houston and more! Feeling good has never been easier!

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: Cross the bridge to the mellow side of classic rock and 70s folk rock. The Eagles, James Taylor, Fleetwood Mac, Simon & Garfunkel and more.

programme.title: The Catholic Channel
programme.desc: Talk about it on The Catholic Channel! Combining a modern talk format and open dialogue, The Catholic Channel focuses on Catholicism in the 21st century, especially as it is lived in today's world. Cardinal Timothy Dolan leads a list of modern voices, including Fr. Dave Dwyer, Lino Rulli, Gus Lloyd, Katie McGrady, and more.

programme.title: The Coffee House
programme.desc: A laid-back mix of acoustic and stripped down songs that invite you to settle in and unplug from the world outside. Relax to a diverse selection of hits, new discoveries and acoustic classics.

programme.title: The Flow
programme.desc: Remember how you felt the first time you heard Beyonce's first solo album? How about the chills that ran down your spine when you heard that CTRL album from SZA? If you do, then you'll be all about THE FLOW! It's all about those good R&B vibes from the 2000s and 2010s. The biggest hits in R&B since the turn of the millennium!

programme.title: The Groove
programme.desc: Get your groove on with Old School R&B. Hear the important artists from the '70s and '80s including Michael Jackson, Luther Vandross, Janet Jackson, EW&F, Isley Brothers, the Gap Band and more.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat stays lit with the hottest R&B and hip-hop, with artists like Chris Brown, Cardi B., SZA, Drake, Doja Cat, Lil' Baby and more!

programme.title: The Highway
programme.desc: Discover the next generation of country superstars on The Highway - where breakthrough Highway Finds meet brand new music from country's biggest hitmakers. Hosted weekdays by Cody Alan, Macie Banks, Buzz Brainard and Ania Hammar from the heart of Broadway in downtown Nashville, Tennessee.

programme.title: The Indigiverse
programme.desc: Welcome to the Indigiverse! Music, news and views from Turtle Island! You'll hear artists like William Prince, A Tribe Called Red, Riit and Snotty Nose Rez Kids, and hosts Kim Wheeler and Kaylen Belair.

programme.title: The Jeff Lewis Channel
programme.desc: Hear the archives, plus exclusive content from your favorite guests and Chumps. It's great news for you, but a nightmare for our lawyers. (explicit)

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Connection
programme.desc: The Kelly Clarkson universe hits the airwaves with The Kelly Clarkson Connection! Make yourself comfortable in Kelly's world - you'll be surrounded by the music she loves, music she's inspired by and the stories behind the songs in Kelly's two-decade long catalog of award-winning hits. Experience the chemistry of The Kelly Clarkson Connection!

programme.title: The Loft
programme.desc: Eclectic rock and rhythm from all-time legends and up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: The Megyn Kelly Channel
programme.desc: The Megyn Kelly Channel is your home for bold, no B.S. news. We don't suffer fools, but we love mocking them! All facts, no apologies. Hear open, honest, and provocative conversations with Megyn, plus other contributors.

programme.title: The Message
programme.desc: Praise and worship music

programme.title: The Pulse
programme.desc: Today's pop music keeping you company through your day. Hear the hits, throwbacks and fresh sounds Taylor Swift, Ed Sheeran, OneRepublic, Ariana Grande and more.

programme.title: The Spectrum
programme.desc: The Spectrum of Rock, spanning more than six decades - from the legends of the 1960s and '70s to the artists breaking through now.

programme.title: The Tragically Hip Radio
programme.desc: The Tragically Hip Radio, playing music from the band's entire catalogue, with exclusive live recordings, rarities, discussions surrounding their history, and the sounds that have influenced their iconic career.

programme.title: The Verge
programme.desc: Discover new and emerging Canadian indie & alternative artists. Learn more about new artists through live in-studio performances, exclusive concerts broadcast live to air & more.

programme.title: The Village
programme.desc: Traditional, contemporary and indie-folk music from the past to today. Hear songs and ballads from songwriters like Bob Dylan, Ellis Paul, Joan Baez, Iron & Wine, Peter Paul & Mary, Dar Williams, Judy Collins, Carolina Chocolate Drops, Pete Seeger, Jesse Welles and more.

programme.title: Top of the Country Radio

You'll hear Dallas Smith, Megan Patrick, Tenille Townes, Tim Hicks, Shania Twain and many more!

programme.title: Triumph
programme.desc: Home to Dr. Laura, Nancy Grace, Dave Ramsey and Glenn Beck. This is radio driven by conviction, where bold voices take on life's toughest topics with clarity, courage and common sense. From personal finance to justice, family and leadership, these hosts don't shy away from the hard conversations, they lean into them. It's a destination for those who believe in standing for something, navigating decisions with integrity, and choosing what's right.

programme.title: U2 X-Radio
programme.desc: This is U2. This is radio. This is U2 X-Radio, featuring the songs of a band from the Northside of Dublin - a complete immersion into the music of Bono, The Edge, Larry Mullen, and Adam Clayton. The band's history, idols, influences, and current passions. Plus inspiration, conversation, culture, commentary, and ideas. U2 X-Radio introduces listeners to old friends and new stories, as well as artists, writers, thinkers, and activists who are changing the world.

programme.title: Underground Garage

programme.title: Unwell Music
programme.desc: A music experience from Call Her Daddy host and Unwell founder Alex Cooper, featuring nostalgic throwbacks and trending hits along with stories from Alex and other Unwell hosts - a soundtrack that delivers the main character energy you deserve! (explicit)

programme.title: Unwell On Air
programme.desc: Welcome to Unwell On Air, the official home for all things trending, curated by Alex Cooper. Catch the best moments from each Unwell Network podcast, alongside exclusive daily radio shows that keep you in the know. We're breaking down the latest in pop culture on The Daily Dirty, and opening up the phone lines on Dialed In, because we want you to join the conversation. Unwell On Air is your one-stop destination for premium, unfiltered content. (explicit)
